title: Resolve zeta/kappa condition: ZK12: B_s / zeta insertion dependency
description: Sector: B_s / zeta insertion. Allowed condition: derive insertion with residual-kill or neutral residual trace and delta M_A = 0. Forbidden condition: B_s or zeta insertion chosen from gamma_like, AB, B=1/A, or recovery target. Consequence: B_s/F_zeta insertion remains outside this script's license.
